# OneHazel — Full Context

> OneHazel is an AI-powered Vertical iPaaS (Integration Platform as a Service) that builds, tests, and maintains vendor integrations automatically. Built by ZS Digital Ltd (trading as Elevate AI) in Malta.

## What OneHazel Does

OneHazel connects enterprise platforms to third-party vendor ecosystems through a unified API. AI agents generate production connectors in minutes, monitor them continuously, and self-heal when APIs change. The platform serves regulated industries including iGaming, healthcare, construction, cannabis, life sciences, and energy.

## Key Facts

- 318 connectors available in the marketplace
- AI agents build connectors from API documentation automatically
- Visual workflow builder with 22 node types
- AI workflow generation from natural language
- Self-healing integrations that detect and repair API changes
- Analytics dashboard with AI co-pilot
- Headquartered in Malta (ZS Digital Ltd, trading as Elevate AI)
- Founded by Keith Zammit

## Technical Architecture

### Unified API
OneHazel exposes a single, consistent API surface across all connected vendors. Customers write once to OneHazel and gain access to every connector in the marketplace without managing individual vendor SDKs or authentication schemes.

### AI Connector Builder
AI agents read vendor API documentation and automatically generate production-ready connectors — including authentication, pagination, error handling, and schema mapping. Connectors are versioned and stored in the marketplace. When a vendor changes their API, the AI detects the drift and self-heals the connector without human intervention.

### Visual Workflow Builder
A drag-and-drop canvas with 22 node types for orchestrating multi-vendor data flows. Supports branching, looping, transformation, error handling, and conditional logic. AI workflow generation allows users to describe a workflow in natural language and have the builder populate it automatically.

### Analytics Dashboard
Real-time observability across all active integrations: throughput, error rates, latency, and action consumption. An AI co-pilot answers questions about integration health, suggests optimisations, and surfaces anomalies.

## Pricing — Full Breakdown

### Plans

| Plan | Price | Actions/mo | AI Actions/mo | Private Connections |
|------|-------|------------|---------------|---------------------|
| Free Trial | Free (14 days) | 50K | 50 | 1 |
| Grow | €999/mo (annual) | 500K | 500 | 3 |
| Scale | €2,499/mo (annual) | 2M | 2,000 | 10 |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | Custom | Custom |

- Founding Partner Programme: 50% off for life — V1.0 is live, sign up now to lock in founding pricing
- All paid plans include full platform access, priority support, and SLA guarantees

### What Is an Action?

An action is one API request or one workflow execution step. Responses and inbound webhooks are not counted as actions. Examples that consume actions: calling a vendor API endpoint, executing a workflow node, triggering a connector sync.

### What Is an AI Action?

An AI action is consumed by any AI-driven operation on the platform:
- Connector lifecycle: AI building, testing, or repairing a connector
- Private connection monitoring: AI continuously checking a private/custom connector for API drift
- In-workflow AI: AI-powered transformation or decision nodes within a workflow
- Co-pilots: AI co-pilot queries in the analytics dashboard or workflow builder

### Top-Up Packs (Pay-as-you-go overages)

**Action Packs**
- 100K actions — €129
- 500K actions — €599
- 1M actions — €1,149

**AI Action Packs**
- 100 AI actions — €129
- 500 AI actions — €599
- 1,000 AI actions — €1,149

**Private Connection Add-ons**
- 1 private connection — €249/mo
- 5 private connections — €1,149/mo

## Industries

### iGaming
Integrations for payment providers, KYC/AML compliance platforms, game aggregators, responsible gaming tools, and affiliate tracking platforms. Designed for licensed operators needing fast, auditable data flows.

### Healthcare
EHR/EMR system integrations, telehealth platform connectivity, lab and diagnostics data pipelines, HIPAA-compliant data handling, and patient engagement platform hooks.

### Construction
Project management software, BIM (Building Information Modelling) platforms, safety compliance systems, fleet and asset management, and procurement/supply chain tools.

### Cannabis
Seed-to-sale tracking systems (Metrc, BioTrack), state compliance reporting, POS integrations, lab testing data pipelines, and distribution platform connectivity.

### Life Sciences
Clinical trial management systems, regulatory submission platforms (FDA, EMA), LIMS integrations, pharmacovigilance data feeds, and medical device data streams.

### Energy & Utilities
SCADA system integrations, smart grid management platforms, renewable energy monitoring (solar, wind), regulatory compliance reporting, and energy trading platforms.

## Company Details

- **Legal name**: ZS Digital Ltd (trading as Elevate AI)
- **Headquarters**: Malta
- **Founder**: Keith Zammit
- **Product**: OneHazel iPaaS (V1.0 live)
- **App**: app.onehazel.com
- **Website**: onehazel.com
- **Status**: Free Trial and Enterprise tiers available. Grow and Scale tiers launching soon.

## Vendor Programme

OneHazel offers a free listing programme for software vendors who want their API available in the OneHazel marketplace:
- Vendors submit their API documentation
- OneHazel AI builds and maintains the connector at no cost to the vendor
- Revenue share model: vendors earn a share of action revenue generated through their connector
- Vendors gain distribution to all OneHazel customers across all supported industries
- Connector stays current automatically — OneHazel handles all breaking change remediation

Full details: https://onehazel.com/vendors

## Platform Provider Programme

For enterprise platforms (ERP, CRM, core systems) that want to offer their customers a managed integration layer:
- API-first architecture: OneHazel sits as the integration layer between the platform and its ecosystem
- Multi-tenant: each platform customer gets isolated connector credentials and workflow namespaces
- Volume-based pricing with committed tiers for high-throughput platform deployments
- White-label options available for Enterprise agreements
- OneHazel handles all connector maintenance, API versioning, and uptime SLAs

Full details: https://onehazel.com/platform-providers
